{%- if (theme_prev_next_buttons_location == 'bottom' or theme_prev_next_buttons_location == 'both') and (next or prev) %}
{%- if prev %} Previous {%- endif %} {%- if next %} Next {%- endif %}
{%- endif %}
{%- block contentinfo %}
© {{ copyright }} {%- if last_updated %} Updated: {{ last_updated }} {%- endif %} Tips {%- if pagename not in ("search", "genindex", "py-modindex") %} Edit on GitHub {%- endif %}
{%- endblock %}
